entries.details: The preserved HotpotQA question asks which magazine had more monthly publications, but the evidence says Vogue became monthly while Y'all was bimonthly; preserving the original answer Y'all leaves the comparison unsupported.

The preserved question asks which game was released first, but the Icehouse evidence supports an invention date for the game system rather than a release date; changing this would require rewriting the final question.
The preserved question asks which mine yielded gold and copper, but the original HotpotQA answer is a sentence fragment rather than a mine name; changing this would alter the benchmark answer.

The preserved HotpotQA answer is flowering plants, but the raw Psychopsis evidence only says it is a genus of orchids; repairing the unsupported fact would require adding external taxonomy not present in the raw context.
